experiences.title: Lead Web Developer
experiences.description: My experience at Juzgrow involved creating custom websites that addressed the diverse needs of GCC businesses. I utilized CMS platforms to deliver user-friendly solutions. By incorporating webhook integrations, I optimized workflows and connected various tools seamlessly.

experiences.title: Node.js Developer Intern
experiences.description: Developed a RESTful API using Node.js and Express. Implemented features like authentication, authorization, and image upload. Learned about RESTful APIs, authentication, and authorization.

experiences.title: WordPress Developer Intern
experiences.description: Assisted organisations and clients in achieving first in Google rankings by applying SEO, Learned Various Cache Techniques and Back-end Optimization to decrease website load time from 6.5 seconds to 0.98 seconds.

experiences.title: Blogging
experiences.description: I write articles in my free time. I write about technology, programming. I also write about my experiences and the things I learn. I have written over 30 articles. I have a passion for writing and sharing my knowledge with others.

experiences.title: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering
experiences.description: I graduated from the Avanthi Institute of Engineering and Technology with a degree in computer science engineering. In my technical courses, I learned discrete mathematics, operating systems, database management systems, computer networks, and the analysis and design of algorithms.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a full-stack admin dashboard to manage any e-commerce analytics and stats, including user, product, transactions, geographical stats & data and real-time revenue tracking.
projects.imageAlt: Admin dashboard showing e-commerce analytics with charts, user statistics, and revenue tracking

projects.title: Sticky Docs
projects.description: A react app to create, read, update, delete and save notes in database. It has features like dragging, color categorization, and theme customization.
projects.imageAlt: Sticky Docs note-taking app with draggable cards, color categories, and dark theme

projects.title: DealsTracker
projects.description: A web app to track deals and offers from amazon and flipkart. It has features like price tracking, price drop alerts, and price history. With Implementation of Web Scraping and Cron Jobs.
projects.imageAlt: DealsTracker app showing product price tracking, deal listings, and price history charts

projects.title: RiteBlog app
projects.description: A blog app where users can create, read, update and delete blog posts. It has features like authentication, authorization, and image upload.
projects.imageAlt: RiteBlog blog application with post listing, authentication, and CRUD functionality

projects.title: Memory Game
projects.description: A Memory Game built with React. It has features like timer, score, and switching themes.
projects.imageAlt: Memory card matching game with timer, score display, and theme options
